debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
σ₂ T x : ℝ
K : ℕ
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioc (5 / 8) 1
t_seq : Fin (K + 2) → ℝ
ht0 : t_seq 0 = max (FKS.Hσ (FKS.Inputs.H₀ I) (FKS.Inputs.R I) σ₂) (exp (√(log x) / FKS.Inputs.R I))
htK : t_seq (Fin.last (K + 1)) = T
ht_incr : StrictMono t_seq
⊢ FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T * x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq 0))) / t_seq 0 ∧
    FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤
      2 *
          ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K + 1)),
            riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k) *
              (x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq (k - 1)))) / t_seq (k - 1) -
                x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq k))) / t_seq k) +
        x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc))) / t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc *
          riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T

failed_attempts:
have h_classical := I.hR
  have h_RH := I.hH₀
  have h_zero_free := riemannZeta.Hσ_zeroes I.H₀ I.R σ₂ h_RH h_classical
  have h_t0_pos : t_seq 0 > 0 := by
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le _ ht0
    refine' max_lt_of_lt_left _ _
    · exact exp_pos _
    · exact Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂
  have h_log_t0_pos : log (t_seq 0) > 0 := log_pos (by linarith [h_t0_pos])
  have h_R_pos : I.R > 0 := by
    have := I.hR
    simp only [riemannZeta.classicalZeroFree] at this
    linarith
  have h_exp_term_pos : x ^ (-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq 0))) > 0 := by positivity
  constructor
  · sorry
  · sorry

have h₁ : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T) * x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq 0))) / (t_seq 0) := by
    sorry
  have h₂ : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * (∑ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K+1)), riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k) * (x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq (k - 1)))) / (t_seq (k - 1)) - x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq k))) / (t_seq k)) ) + x^(-1 / (I.R * log (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc))) / (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc) * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T := by
    sorry
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

apply And.intro
  · sorry
  · sorry
